questions.title: Nine individuals: Ahmed, Bilal, Danish, Faisal, Haroon, Liaquat, Maryam, Shiza and Zeeshan are to serve on three committees labeled A, B, and C.
questions.explanation:
Questions 1 – 7

Nine individuals: Ahmed, Bilal, Danish, Faisal, Haroon, Liaquat, Maryam, Shiza, and Zeeshan are to serve on three committees labeled A, B, and C.

  1. Each candidate should serve on exactly one of the committees
  2. Every committee must have at least one member
  3. Committee A should consist of exactly one member more than that committee B
  4. Among Maryam, Shiza, and Zeeshan none can serve on committee A
  5. Among Faisal, Harron, and Liaquat none can serve on committee B
  6. Among Ahmed, Bilal, and Danish none can serve on committee C

Condition and Solutiion:

part 1. In case Danish and Zeeshan are the individuals serving on committee B, how many of the nine individuals should serve on committee C?

(A) 2

(B) 3

(C) 4

(D) 5


part 2. Of the nine individuals, the maximum number that can serve together on committee C is

(A) 5

(B) 6

(C) 7

(D) 8

(E) 9

part 3. In case Ahmed is the only individual serving on committee B, which among the following should serve on committee A?

(A) Bilal and Danish

(B) Bilal and Faisal

(C) Bilal and Liaquat

(D) Faisal and Haroon

(E) Danish and Haroon


part 4. In case, any of the nine individuals serves on committee C, which among the following could not be the candidate to serve on committee A?

(A) Ahmed

(B) Bilal

(C) Danish

(D)  Shiza


part 5. In case, Bilal, Danish, and Maryam are the only individuals serving on committee B, the total membership of committee C should be

(A) 5

(B) 4

(C) 3

(D) 2

part 6. In case, Bilal, Danish, and Maryam are the only individuals serving on committee B, then the members of committee C should be

(A) Haroon and Shiza

(B) Maryam and Zeeshan

(C) Shiza and Zeeshan

(D) Faisal and Shiza

part 7. Among the following combinations which could constitute the membership of committee C?

(A) Danish and Shiza

(B) Faisal and Maryam

(C) Liaquat, Maryam and Shiza

(D) Faisal, Haroon and Liaquat

questions.title: Saba ul Masani means ?
questions.explanation:
• Saba ul Masani means Surah Fatiha
  • ***
  • The reason why Surah Al-Fatihah is called Saba' al-Masani is that we are supposed to recite it in every Rakah of every Salah.
  • the other name of Surah Fatiha: are Umm al-Quran and Umm al-Kitab
  • Saba'  is the 34th chapter (sūrah) of the Qur'an with 54 verses (āyāt)
  • ***
  • Al-Fatiha is also known by several other names:
  • such as Al-Hamd (The Praise),
  • As-Salah (The Prayer),
  • Umm al-Kitab (Mother of the Book),
  • Umm al-Quran (Mother of the Quran),
  • Saba min al-Mathani (Seven Repeated Ones, from Quran 15:87),
  • and Ash-Shifa' (The Cure).
  • ****
  • Note:
  • don't confuse the word "Saba ul masani " with "Saba ul misani"
  • Saba ul Masani means surat Fatiha
  • Saba ul Misani means the seven repitation

questions.title: How much conditions for a Sahih Hadith____
questions.explanation:
A Sahih (authentic) hadith must meet five specific conditions

1 – Good character of all its narrators 

2 – Good memory and precision on the part of narrators with regard to what they are narrating. 

3 – Continuous isnaad from beginning to end, meaning that each narrator heard the hadeeth from the one before him. 

4 – The hadeeth is free from any oddness in its isnaad or text.  

5 – The hadeeth is free from faults in its isnaad and text.




Last updated by NA on 23-April-2026

questions.title: تجارتی قافلے کا سردار کون تھا ؟
questions.explanation:
ابو سفیان بن حرب لشکر کے سردار تھے جو غزوہ بدر کے موقع پر شام سے مکہ واپس آ رہا تھا،

اور جس پر مسلمانوں نے حملہ کر کے اس قافلے پر غلبہ حاصل کیا। 

یہ قافلہ قریش کے لیے تجارت کی غرض سے شام گیا تھا،

جس کے سردار ابو سفیان تھے،

اور اس کا سامان بہت زیادہ تھا مسلمانوں نے اس قافلے کو روک کر قریش کی طاقت کو کم کرنے کی کوشش کی

اور اس کے نتیجے میں غزوہ بدر پیش آیا
